nodes.name: ⏰ Poll for KDP-Ready Products (Every 8h)
nodes.notes: Checks Google Sheets for products approved for KDP publishing. Runs every 8 hours.

nodes.name: 📊 Read KDP Queue
nodes.notes: Reads products queued for KDP. You populate this from Research_Opportunities by setting Status = Approved_For_KDP.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Detect KDP Book Type + Specs
nodes.notes: Detects which of the 5 book types to generate based on product category. Sets correct KDP trim size, page count, format, and pricing for each type.

values.content: You are an expert Kindle and Amazon KDP ebook author. You write complete, professional ebooks optimized for Kindle readers. You understand KDP publishing requirements, keyword optimization, and what makes ebooks sell on Amazon. You write content that is engaging, well-structured, and provides genuine value. Respond in valid JSON only.

nodes.name: 🧠 llama3 — Write Kindle eBook
nodes.notes: llama3 writes the complete Kindle ebook with all metadata. KDP-specific metadata format including HTML book description, BISAC codes, and 7 kindle keywords.

values.content: You are an expert KDP low content book designer. You create professional interiors for planners, journals, trackers, and notebooks that sell well on Amazon. You understand KDP interior specifications, bleed/margin requirements, and what makes low content books functional and beautiful. Respond in valid JSON only.

nodes.name: 🧠 llama3 — Design Low Content Book
nodes.notes: Designs complete 120-page low content book interior. Generates all page types: cover, title page, section headers, content pages. Includes KDP-specific specs (bleed, margins, paper color, spine).

values.content: You are an expert coloring book designer and AI art director for KDP. You create professional coloring book interiors with beautiful line-art descriptions and AI image generation prompts. You understand that KDP coloring books need clean black and white line art, proper bleed, and varied complexity levels. Respond in valid JSON only.

nodes.name: 🧠 phi3 — Design Coloring Book
nodes.notes: phi3 designs 40-page coloring book with SD prompts for each page. Proper KDP specs: bleed, black/white interior, blank backs. Uses phi3 because it's excellent at precise technical specifications.

values.content: You are an expert educational activity book creator for KDP. You design engaging, educational activity books for children and adults. You understand KDP activity book requirements and create content that is fun, educational, and age-appropriate. All content must be family-friendly and halal. Respond in valid JSON only.

nodes.name: 🧠 llama3 — Create Activity Book
nodes.notes: Creates complete educational activity book with diverse activity types. All content halal and family-friendly.

values.content: You are an expert puzzle book creator for KDP. You generate complete word search puzzles, crossword puzzles, and other word games. You understand KDP puzzle book formatting and what sells. Create puzzles that are genuinely solvable and entertaining. Respond in valid JSON only.

nodes.name: 🧠 llama3 — Create Puzzle Book
nodes.notes: Creates complete puzzle book with word searches, crosswords, scrambles. HTML grid-based puzzles that convert cleanly to print PDF.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Parse Book Content
nodes.notes: Universal parser for all 5 book types. Normalizes the structure for the HTML builder.

nodes.name: 🖥️ Build KDP-Formatted HTML
nodes.notes: Builds complete, KDP-compliant HTML for all book types. Correct margins (0.875in inside for 120+ pages), 8.5x11 page size, print-ready CSS. Different templates per book type.

parameters.command:
=# Write HTML to file
cat > '{{ $json.html_path }}' << 'BOOKEOF'
{{ $json.html_content.substring(0, 100000) }}
BOOKEOF

# Convert to PDF with KDP specs
# 8.5x11in = 612x792pt
wkhtmltopdf \
  --page-width 8.5in \
  --page-height 11in \
  --margin-top 0 \
  --margin-right 0 \
  --margin-bottom 0 \
  --margin-left 0 \
  --dpi 300 \
  --image-quality 100 \
  --enable-local-file-access \
  --print-media-type \
  --no-outline \
  '{{ $json.html_path }}' '{{ $json.pdf_path }}' 2>&1

# Verify
if [ -f '{{ $json.pdf_path }}' ]; then
  SIZE=$(ls -lh '{{ $json.pdf_path }}' | awk '{print $5}')
  PAGES=$(pdfinfo '{{ $json.pdf_path }}' 2>/dev/null | grep Pages | awk '{print $2}' || echo 'unknown')
  echo "SUCCESS|{{ $json.pdf_path }}|$SIZE|$PAGES pages"
else
  echo "FAILED|PDF not created"
fi

nodes.name: 💻 Render KDP Interior PDF
nodes.notes: Renders KDP-spec PDF at 300 DPI. Uses wkhtmltopdf with exact KDP dimensions. Install poppler-utils for pdfinfo: apt-get install poppler-utils

parameters.command:
=# Generate EPUB for Kindle (ebooks only)
BOOK_TYPE='{{ $json.book_type }}'
PRODUCT_ID='{{ $json.product_id }}'
TITLE='{{ $json.metadata.title }}'
AUTHOR='{{ $json.metadata.author_name }}'
EPUB_PATH='{{ $json.epub_path }}'
HTML_PATH='{{ $json.html_path }}'

if [ "$BOOK_TYPE" = "ebook" ]; then
  # Install pandoc if not present
  which pandoc || apt-get install -y pandoc 2>/dev/null
  
  # Convert HTML to EPUB using pandoc
  pandoc \
    --from html \
    --to epub3 \
    --output "$EPUB_PATH" \
    --metadata title="$TITLE" \
    --metadata author="$AUTHOR" \
    --metadata lang="en" \
    --epub-cover-image="/tmp/kdp_${PRODUCT_ID}_cover.jpg" \
    "$HTML_PATH" 2>&1
  
  if [ -f "$EPUB_PATH" ]; then
    echo "EPUB_SUCCESS|$EPUB_PATH"
  else
    echo "EPUB_SKIPPED|Not an ebook type or conversion failed"
  fi
else
  echo "EPUB_SKIPPED|Book type is $BOOK_TYPE - no EPUB needed"
fi

nodes.name: 📱 Build EPUB (Kindle Format)
nodes.notes: Converts ebooks to EPUB3 format for Kindle. Uses pandoc. Install: apt-get install pandoc. Skipped automatically for non-ebook types (PDF-only).

values.content: You are a KDP cover designer. You generate precise Stable Diffusion prompts for book covers that meet KDP specifications and stand out in Amazon search results. You know exactly what makes covers convert. Respond in valid JSON only.

nodes.name: 🧠 phi3 — Design Book Cover
nodes.notes: phi3 designs the complete book cover including SD prompt, text layout, spine, and back cover. Runs in parallel with PDF rendering.

nodes.name: 🎨 Generate Cover Background Image
nodes.notes: Generates cover background at KDP spec dimensions (1600x2560 = portrait book cover). Uses Replicate SDXL.

nodes.name: 📦 Assemble KDP Package
nodes.notes: Assembles the complete KDP upload package: interior PDF + EPUB + cover image + all metadata formatted for KDP upload form.

nodes.name: 📊 Write to KDP_Upload_Queue Sheet
nodes.notes: Writes the complete KDP package to the upload queue sheet. You'll use this as your upload checklist and Workflow 08B reads it to auto-upload to D2D and PublishDrive.

meta.description: Workflow 08A: KDP Book Factory. Generates all 5 book types: Kindle eBooks (with EPUB), Low Content Books (planners/journals), Coloring Books (SD prompts per page), Activity Books, Puzzle Books. Produces KDP-spec PDFs at 300 DPI, EPUB3 for Kindle, AI-generated cover. Writes complete upload package to KDP_Upload_Queue sheet.
